Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mildly decreased total CO₂, possibly indicating mild metabolic acidosis. ALT is elevated, which may reflect mild liver injury, while triglycerides are also high. Globulin is reported as low, but the unit appears inconsistent; please verify. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal and liver function.
